# Acme Corp Brand Guide

## Identity

- **Brand Name:** Acme Corp
- **Tagline:** Move fast, build trust.

## Colors

- **Primary:** #2F99A4
- **Accent:** #FF4D00
- **Background:** #FFFFFF
- **Text:** #1A1A2E
- **Error:** #DC2626
- **Success:** #16A34A

## Typography

- **Headings:** Raleway Bold 48px
- **Subheadings:** Raleway SemiBold 24px
- **Body:** Open Sans Regular 16px
- **Caption:** Open Sans Regular 12px
- **Font stack fallback:** Raleway, system-ui, sans-serif for headings; Open Sans, system-ui, sans-serif for body

## Voice

- **Tone:** Direct, warm, technical but approachable
- **Personality traits:** Confident, helpful, precise, optimistic
- **Forbidden terms:** leverage, synergize, utilize
- **Grammar:** Sentence case for headings. Active voice. Contractions OK.

## Logo Usage

- Primary logo: logo.svg
- Clear space: 2x logo mark height on all sides
- Minimum size: 32px tall for digital

## Imagery

- Photography: High contrast, natural light, real people in real environments
- Illustration: Flat vector, line weight 2px, use primary color for accents
